work.name: Energy Intellect
work.summary: EI was a market leader in Smart Grid metering and technologies. I worked on all phases of its iE2 product range, including iBO (entity and market management web application) and Clariti (data presentation web application).
highlights: I was involved in all successful deliveries of both products since their inceptions.
I developed and continuously enhanced the automated testing of both products, and the pipelines that drove testing and product release

work.name: Marconi (formerly GE, formerly Fore, formerly Euristix)</sub>
work.summary: Consultant network and telecomms software developer
highlights: Progressed from software developer to lead software developer in a fast growing software company specialising in telecommunications software and embedded operating systems. Worked on a wide range of projects and languages, for clients across Europe and the United States.
Lead development on a SNMP MIB-2 browser (Java)
Revamped a large codebase for network switches (C++) to eliminate memory faults and add comprehensive exception handling.

projects.name: Managed Services Team Lead
projects.description: I lead the joint development, operations and support team managing the cloud-hosted applications for our client.
highlights: Coaching and mentoring the development team to improve their development practices.
Cloud architecture enhancements focusing on security, maintainability and cost.
Introducing new tools and technologies to teams to simplify and streamline development and deployment practices.
Embedding a successful DevOps culture in the team, enabling me to step back and assume a Product Owner role.

projects.name: Developer Practices Consultant
projects.description: I work with clients to improve their software development practices, including CI/CD, testing, security, software design and architecture, and cloud infrastructure.
highlights: I have worked with a wide range of clients across a variety of industries, including finance, telecommunications, energy and government.
I have helped clients to improve their software development practices, including implementing CI/CD pipelines, improving testing practices, and enhancing software design and architecture.
I have also helped clients to improve their cloud infrastructure, including implementing Infrastructure as Code and improving security, observability and cost effectiveness.

awards.title: Bursary - Applied Mathematics
awards.summary: Matriculation bursary for highest score in Applied Mathematics.

awards.title: Puluminary
awards.summary: MVP recognition for contribution to the Pulumi community.

references.name: Wayne Thomson
references.reference: I worked with Paul while he was a developer and then a test lead. He was very successful at both of those roles. His technical ability is excellent and he has a great attention to detail. He was always introducing new ideas and technologies and contributing in many capacities. As a fresh grad I learned a great many things from Paul. Paul is a great asset for any team.

references.name: Hugh Fitzpatrick
references.reference:
Paul is a first rate Innovator.  He is an expert at providing effective, 
 innovative and timely solutions to very complex problems.

 He is un-phased by challenges, and surpasses expectation. His
 knowledge of Computer Science and Engineering is vast and 
 impressive.

 Paul's contributions and merit are extremely valuable !!!
